title: Python
text: Home * Programming * Languages * Python Python , a general-purpose , high-level programming language , supporting object-oriented , imperative , functional , procedural , and reflective programming paradigms , conceived and implemented by Guido van Rossum in the late 80s. Python features a dynamic type system and automatic memory management and has a large standard library [1] . While used as scripting language along with a Python interpreter available for many operating systems, Python code can be packaged into standalone executable programs [2] .
